# AUDIT REPORT: Strategic Scaling System (SSS) Documentation Suite
*Generated by Nate Jones Prompt Architect Framework v1.0*

**Audit Date:** 2026-01-25
**Auditor:** Claude (following Nate Jones Prompt Architecture standards)
**Documents Audited:** 3 (SSS-PRD.md, SSS-MICRO-SKILLS.md, MASTER-AGENT.md)

---

## EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

| Document | Type | Health Rating | Recommendation |
|----------|------|---------------|----------------|
| SSS-PRD.md | Requirements | **GOOD** | PASS with notes |
| SSS-MICRO-SKILLS.md | Leaf Skills Collection | **GOOD** | PASS with notes |
| MASTER-AGENT.md | Orchestrator | **EXCELLENT** | PASS |

**Overall System Health:** GOOD - Ready for implementation with minor improvements recommended

**One-Line Verdict:** The SSS documentation suite is well-structured with clear specifications, explicit constraints, and comprehensive guardrails. Minor improvements would enhance constraint ratios and add anti-exemplars.

---

## DOCUMENT 1: SSS-PRD.md

### Document Classification
- **Type:** Requirements Document (not a skill)
- **Purpose:** Define "what success looks like"
- **Standards Applied:** Modified Four-Block (adapted for PRD), Constraint Ratio, Specificity, Slop Density

### Scoring Dashboard

| Dimension | Score | Threshold | Status | Notes |
|-----------|-------|-----------|--------|-------|
| Four-Block Compliance | **17/20** | ≥16 | **PASS** | Strong Purpose (5), Instructions (4), Reference (4), Output (4) |
| Constraint Ratio | **0.58** | ≥0.60 | **MARGINAL** | 47 constraints, 34 instructions |
| Specificity Score | **85%** | ≥80% | **PASS** | 11 of 13 sections in Goldilocks zone |
| Guardrail Coverage | **5/7** | ≥5 | **PASS** | Missing: Trigger-Template Refusals, Three-Tier Uncertainty |
| Slop Density | **0.3** | ≤2.0 | **PASS** | 1 instance in 333 lines |

### Four-Block Breakdown

| Block | Score | Assessment |
|-------|-------|------------|
| PURPOSE | 5/5 | Clear problem statement, audience (advertising ops), scope boundaries (v1 vs v2), success criteria defined |
| INSTRUCTIONS | 4/5 | Clear acceptance criteria, quality gates, data pipeline steps. Missing: conditional logic for edge cases |
| REFERENCE | 4/5 | Complete code tables, naming convention spec, example values. Missing: anti-exemplars (what NOT to do) |
| OUTPUT | 4/5 | 6 views specified with column definitions. Missing: exact file format specifications |

### Constraint Analysis

**Strong Constraints Found:**
- "Spend >= 0" (non-negative)
- "Minimum spend threshold: $2,500"
- "Net ROAS ≥ 1.0 for Winner classification"
- "14-position format" requirement
- "Skip row (critical field)" for missing Spend

**Constraint Gaps:**
1. No explicit constraint on maximum values (potential data quality issue)
2. No constraint on date range validity (how old is too old?)
3. Missing constraint on Net Revenue being non-negative

### Specificity Analysis

| Section | Zone | Issue |
|---------|------|-------|
| 2.2 Asset Classification | Goldilocks | Clear criteria with exact thresholds |
| 3.2 Naming Convention | Goldilocks | Exact positions with validation patterns |
| 4.1 Ad Level Tracking | Goldilocks | All 18 columns defined with sources |
| 5.1 Error Handling | Goldilocks | Specific behaviors for each error type |
| 8. Future Enhancements | Slightly Vague | "sufficient data exists" undefined |
| 6.2 Data Freshness | Goldilocks | Exact targets (Weekly, 7 days, All-time) |

### Slop Scan

**Total Instances:** 1
**Lines Scanned:** 333
**Density:** 0.3 per 100 lines

| Line | Category | Instance | Fix |
|------|----------|----------|-----|
| 12 | Vague Modifier | "actionable insights" | "specific recommendations for expansion decisions" |

### Findings

**P3 (Medium):** Constraint ratio is slightly below threshold (0.58 vs 0.60). Add 3-4 more explicit constraints:
- Maximum reasonable spend value
- Date range boundaries for valid data
- Net Revenue non-negative constraint

**P4 (Low):** Missing anti-exemplars in Reference section. Would help future developers understand what NOT to parse.

### Health Rating: GOOD
**Recommendation:** PASS with notes - Ready for implementation. Optional constraint additions would bring to EXCELLENT.

## DOCUMENT 2: SSS-MICRO-SKILLS.md

### Document Classification
- **Type:** Leaf Skills Collection (11 active skills + 2 v2 skills)
- **Purpose:** Define "what each skill does"
- **Standards Applied:** Leaf Skill thresholds (Guardrail ≥3, Production Principles ≥3)

### Scoring Dashboard

| Dimension | Score | Threshold | Status | Notes |
|-----------|-------|-----------|--------|-------|
| Four-Block Compliance | **18/20** | ≥16 | **PASS** | Every skill has Purpose, Inputs, Outputs, Success Criteria |
| Constraint Ratio | **0.62** | ≥0.60 | **PASS** | Heavy constraint language in validation rules |
| Specificity Score | **88%** | ≥80% | **PASS** | 15 of 17 major sections in Goldilocks zone |
| Guardrail Coverage | **4/7** | ≥3 (leaf) | **PASS** | Present: Identity, Binary Rules, Locked Grammar, Post-Tool Reflection |
| Slop Density | **0.6** | ≤2.0 | **PASS** | 5 instances in 795 lines |

### Four-Block Breakdown (Aggregate Across Skills)

| Block | Score | Assessment |
|-------|-------|------------|
| PURPOSE | 5/5 | Every skill has single-sentence purpose statement |
| INSTRUCTIONS | 4/5 | Clear inputs/outputs, validation rules. Some skills lack conditional edge case handling |
| REFERENCE | 4/5 | Validation rules, code tables, dependencies documented. Missing: exemplar outputs |
| OUTPUT | 5/5 | YAML output specs for every skill with exact field definitions |

### Per-Skill Quality Assessment

| Skill | Purpose | I/O Spec | Error Handling | Score |
|-------|---------|----------|----------------|-------|
| 0.1 state-manager | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ✅ Defined | 5/5 |
| 0.2 naming-parser | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ✅ Comprehensive | 5/5 |
| 0.3 error-handler | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ✅ Meta-handler | 5/5 |
| 1.1 csv-ingester | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ✅ Defined | 5/5 |
| 1.2 deduplicator | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ⚠️ Light | 4/5 |
| 1.3 data-validator | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ✅ Defined | 5/5 |
| 2.1 aggregator | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ✅ Edge cases | 5/5 |
| 2.2 classifier | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ⚠️ None explicit | 4/5 |
| 2.3 metric-calculator | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ✅ Null handling | 5/5 |
| 3.1 view-generator | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ⚠️ Light | 4/5 |
| 3.2 comparison-analyzer | ✅ Clear | ✅ Complete | ⚠️ None explicit | 4/5 |

**Average Skill Score:** 4.6/5

### Constraint Analysis

**Strong Constraints Found:**
- "100% of valid naming conventions parse correctly" (naming-parser)
- "Aggregated spend matches sum of raw spend" (deduplicator)
- "Classification matches PRD rules exactly" (classifier)
- Regex patterns for each field position
- Business Logic Validation rules (Net New requires xx expansion)

**Constraint Gaps:**
1. `classifier` skill lacks explicit error handling constraints
2. `comparison-analyzer` missing constraint on minimum data for statistical validity
3. No explicit constraint on concurrent execution (can two skills run simultaneously?)

### Guardrail Audit

| Pattern | Status | Evidence |
|---------|--------|----------|
| 1. Identity Invariants | **PRESENT** | Skills have clear "Purpose" defining what they are |
| 2. Trigger-Template Refusals | ABSENT | No explicit refusal templates |
| 3. Three-Tier Uncertainty | ABSENT | No confidence-based behavior defined |
| 4. Locked Tool Grammar | **PRESENT** | Input parameters with Required/Optional, exact types |
| 5. Binary Style Rules | **PRESENT** | "100% accuracy", "matches exactly", "no data loss" |
| 6. Positional Reinforcement | ABSENT | Success criteria only at end, not reinforced |
| 7. Post-Tool Reflection | **PRESENT** | Validation in Success Criteria sections |

### Slop Scan

| Line | Category | Instance | Fix |
|------|----------|----------|-----|
| 11 | Generic | "single-purpose functions" | "functions with exactly one responsibility" |
| 13 | Generic | "one thing well" | Remove (redundant with "Atomic" definition) |
| 462 | Vague | "TBD" | Decide: weighted or unweighted average |
| 655 | Vague | "Suggest next tests" | "Rank untested expansion types by predicted success rate" |
| 672 | Hedge | "confidence: high/medium" | Define exact confidence calculation |

### Findings

**P2 (High):** `classifier` and `comparison-analyzer` skills need explicit error handling sections. What happens if input data is malformed?

**P3 (Medium):** Line 462 contains "TBD" - this should be resolved before implementation. Decision: Is average ROAS weighted by spend or simple average?

**P3 (Medium):** v2 skills (recommendation-engine, threshold-alerter) have less rigorous specifications. Acceptable for "NOT_STARTED" status but should be enhanced when scope changes.

### Health Rating: GOOD
**Recommendation:** PASS with notes - Add error handling to classifier and comparison-analyzer before implementation.

## DOCUMENT 3: MASTER-AGENT.md

### Document Classification
- **Type:** Orchestrator Skill
- **Purpose:** Define "how skills work together"
- **Standards Applied:** Orchestrator thresholds (Guardrail ≥6, Production Principles ≥5, State Awareness REQUIRED)

### Scoring Dashboard

| Dimension | Score | Threshold | Status | Notes |
|-----------|-------|-----------|--------|-------|
| Four-Block Compliance | **19/20** | ≥16 | **PASS** | Comprehensive in all four blocks |
| Constraint Ratio | **0.67** | ≥0.60 | **PASS** | Heavy guardrail section with NEVER/ALWAYS/MUST |
| Specificity Score | **92%** | ≥80% | **PASS** | 23 of 25 sections in Goldilocks zone |
| Guardrail Coverage | **6/7** | ≥6 (orchestrator) | **PASS** | Only missing: Three-Tier Uncertainty |
| Slop Density | **0.4** | ≤2.0 | **PASS** | 4 instances in 968 lines |
| Production Principles | **5/6** | ≥5 (orchestrator) | **PASS** | Missing: Capability-Based Routing |
| State Awareness | **5/5** | Required | **PASS** | Full state machine with 11 states |

### Four-Block Breakdown

| Block | Score | Assessment |
|-------|-------|------------|
| PURPOSE | 5/5 | Clear scope, audience (agent + human), companion docs referenced |
| INSTRUCTIONS | 5/5 | 4-phase workflow, state machine, explicit decision rules, checkpoints |
| REFERENCE | 4/5 | Skills Quick Reference, code examples, output formats. Missing: 1-2 anti-exemplars |
| OUTPUT | 5/5 | 7 tabs specified, complete column definitions, YAML output specs |

### Guardrail Audit

| Pattern | Status | Evidence |
|---------|--------|----------|
| 1. Identity Invariants | **PRESENT** | Agent Identity YAML block with scope, trigger, output |
| 2. Trigger-Template Refusals | **PRESENT** | Checkpoint responses (APPROVE/REVIEW/CANCEL with exact outputs) |
| 3. Three-Tier Uncertainty | ABSENT | No confidence tiers defined |
| 4. Locked Tool Grammar | **PRESENT** | Phase prerequisites, skill dependencies, exact invocation |
| 5. Binary Style Rules | **PRESENT** | "NEVER overwrite without backup", "ALWAYS pause for human review" |
| 6. Positional Reinforcement | **PRESENT** | Key rules in Purpose, repeated in Guardrails section |
| 7. Post-Tool Reflection | **PRESENT** | Checkpoint 2 validation before PERSIST |

### Production Principles Assessment

| Principle | Score | Evidence |
|-----------|-------|----------|
| 1. Stateful Intelligence | 2/2 | State machine with 11 states, checkpoint system |
| 2. Bounded Uncertainty | 2/2 | Human checkpoints at decision points |
| 3. Intelligent Failure Detection | 2/2 | Error categorization matrix, recovery actions |
| 4. Capability-Based Routing | 0/2 | No dynamic routing based on model capabilities |
| 5. Behavioral Consistency | 2/2 | Explicit state transitions, no undefined behaviors |
| 6. Continuous Validation | 2/2 | Validation at ingestion, processing, and output |

**Score:** 10/12 = **5/6 normalized**

### State Machine Quality

| Aspect | Assessment |
|--------|------------|
| State Completeness | All 11 states documented with descriptions |
| Transition Clarity | State transition diagram with arrows showing valid paths |
| Error States | ERROR state defined with recovery options |
| Human Checkpoints | 2 explicit checkpoints (AWAITING_VALIDATION, AWAITING_REVIEW) |
| Terminal States | COMPLETE, CANCELLED, ERROR all terminate cleanly |

**State Machine Grade:** EXCELLENT

### Historical Data Integration (New Section in v1.3)

This section addresses a critical ambiguity:

| Question | Answer | Clarity |
|----------|--------|---------|
| Does Raw_Daily_Data APPEND or REPLACE? | APPEND | ✅ Explicit |
| Does aggregation sum ALL-TIME or new data? | ALL-TIME | ✅ Explicit |
| Is classification cumulative or snapshot? | CUMULATIVE | ✅ Explicit |

**Assessment:** This section eliminates ambiguity that could cause implementation errors. Well done.

### Checkpoint 2 Clarity (Updated in v1.3)

The updated Checkpoint 2 now shows:
- "THIS WEEK'S IMPORT" section
- "CUMULATIVE STATE" section
- "NEW WINNERS THIS WEEK" with threshold crossing emphasis
- Delta reporting ("Was: Potential → Now: Winner")

**Assessment:** Excellent clarity on what human is reviewing.

### Slop Scan

| Line | Category | Instance | Fix |
|------|----------|----------|-----|
| 13 | Filler | "how they work together" | Remove (redundant with Purpose) |
| 125 | Generic | "predictable path" | "deterministic execution order" |
| 821 | Vague | "reasonable" | Define exact criteria |
| 941 | Hedge | "worth revisiting" | "scheduled for v2 evaluation" |

### Findings

**P4 (Low):** Missing Three-Tier Uncertainty pattern. Could add confidence levels for classification (e.g., assets near $2,500 threshold flagged as "borderline").

**P4 (Low):** No Capability-Based Routing. All execution assumes single model. Could add fallback to simpler processing if API limits hit.

### Health Rating: EXCELLENT
**Recommendation:** PASS - Production ready. Minor enhancements are optional polish.

## AGGREGATE ASSESSMENT

### Critical Dimensions Summary (All Documents)

| Dimension | PRD | Micro-Skills | Master-Agent | System Status |
|-----------|-----|--------------|--------------|---------------|
| Four-Block | 17/20 ✅ | 18/20 ✅ | 19/20 ✅ | **PASS** |
| Constraint Ratio | 0.58 ⚠️ | 0.62 ✅ | 0.67 ✅ | **PASS** (1 marginal) |
| Specificity | 85% ✅ | 88% ✅ | 92% ✅ | **PASS** |
| Guardrails | 5/7 ✅ | 4/7 ✅ | 6/7 ✅ | **PASS** |
| Slop Density | 0.3 ✅ | 0.6 ✅ | 0.4 ✅ | **PASS** |

**Critical Dimensions Passing:** 14 of 15 (93%)
**System-Wide Health:** GOOD

### Priority-Ordered Improvements

| Priority | Document | Action | Impact |
|----------|----------|--------|--------|
| P2 | Micro-Skills | Add error handling to `classifier` and `comparison-analyzer` | Prevents implementation gaps |
| P3 | PRD | Add 3-4 more explicit constraints (max values, date range) | Improves constraint ratio to ≥0.60 |
| P3 | Micro-Skills | Resolve "TBD" on weighted vs unweighted ROAS average | Eliminates ambiguity |
| P4 | All | Add anti-exemplars (what NOT to produce/parse) | Improves Reference block scores |
| P4 | Master-Agent | Consider adding Three-Tier Uncertainty for borderline classifications | Polish enhancement |

### Delivery Recommendation

| Phase | Documents | Status |
|-------|-----------|--------|
| **Implementation Ready** | MASTER-AGENT.md v1.3 | ✅ APPROVED |
| **Implementation Ready** | SSS-PRD.md v1.0 | ✅ APPROVED |
| **Implementation Ready** | SSS-MICRO-SKILLS.md v1.0 | ⚠️ Add error handling to 2 skills first |

**Final Verdict:** The SSS documentation suite passes the Nate Jones Prompt Architecture Audit. The system is ready for implementation with the P2 improvement recommended before building the `classifier` and `comparison-analyzer` skills.
